title: codereview pass 3: inconsistency with coap_key_store full error
description: coap_keys.c uses -ENOMEM for key store full (CONFIG_LICHEN_COAP_KEYS_MAX_ENTRIES), while app_identity now uses -ENOSPC for peer table. Either standardize on one (prefer -ENOSPC for capacity), update coap_keys docs/tests/find_free_slot_locked, or add comment explaining difference. This is P4 but per instructions treat as real work. Related to project-LICHEN-m356 TOFU review. Tag: codereview. Parent: project-LICHEN-pc5y
